text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Right before training,<n>Matikanefukukitaru calls me
to the<n>academy library. It's pitch black<n>inside.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hohoho... Welcome, welcome! You<n>are the first
lucky wayward lamb to<n>visit me...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Click...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Argh! My eyes! Why did you turn the<n>lights on?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I put in a lot of work to set the mood...<n>You've
gone and ruined it.
choice_data_list: What did you want to talk about?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Aiyee, you're jumping straight to the<n>point?!
You're that interested in what<n>I have for you?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But of course you are! Well you see,<n>I'd like to
include you in my<n>fortune-telling session today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: That's right! I'm calling it "Trainer<n>Divination"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's simple—all you've got to do is<n>pick a card. The
type of card will<n>reveal to us the outcome of
today's<n>training session!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Come now, there are three cards on<n>the desk. Pick
whichever one you<n>like!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If you could, pick the great fortune<n>one! Pretty
please...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru's eyes are<n>twinkling more
than usual. Hm, which<n>card should I choose?
choice_data_list: The suspicious-looking card on the right.
The suspicious-looking card in the middle.
The suspicious-looking card on the left.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Is that your final answer? Then let's<n>turn it over
and take a look!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Flip...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Would you look at that! It's a<n>picture of a
cheetah with a belly full of<n>food!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
The cheetah is the symbol of speed.<n>And there's
nothing better than<n>eating to your heart's content!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
An omen of fortune is an omen of<n>fortune. Luck
will surely come our<n>way! Something good,
happen to us,<n>please!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In our training session after,<n>Matikanefukukitaru
achieves a new<n>personal best lap time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Would you look at that! It's a person<n>grasping a
flame high in the air!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
These blazing flames symbolize<n>victory. In other
words, I'm going to<n>seize hold of something that
will bode<n>good prospects!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I don't know why, but I'm pumped<n>up and ready
to go! Let's hit the track<n>running!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She goes above and beyond in our<n>training
session after, grasping some<n>sort of new
technique in the process.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eek! This picture... Isn't that the<n>you-know-who
that carries the<n>scythe?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Training's cancelled today! It's an<n>absolute no-no
for me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This means the absolute worst! The<n>apocalypse,
plagues, hopelessness,<n>large-scale heartbreak, a
supernova...<n>Uuughhh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I manage to get Matikanefukukitaru<n>to do some
training, but she's totally<n>lacking in energy...
